series_metadata.series_title: Ballot Initiatives and Referendum Certification Letters
series_metadata.series_description: Certification letters for ballot initiatives and referendums related to the Ohio Attorney General's Office (OAG) responsibilities set forth in ORC 3519.01.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 15 years from certification, unless scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain 15 years from certification., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
